customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be among the best in its class, with reliable performance and quick, professional installation by Aquaguard experts. The product delivers clean drinking water and has an elegant design, while customers appreciate its good taste and value for money. The service aspect receives mixed feedback, with some customers praising the service while others report poor service experiences.

reviews.author: Bobby Bujji
reviews.title: Good product and nice performance
reviews.body: It's good product and easyly instalation proses it works nice water purifying good tq

reviews.title: Water purifier
reviews.body: It is good and technician and installation also went very well and the size and fitting also very apt to the placement and it is useful when we compare with normal thing

reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: Product is genuine and good. Technician has visited yesterday on 03/07/2026.and installed properly. Technician behaviour was good.
